privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heading: How we protect your data
privacy.intro: At CampusFlow (BornoSoft), we prioritize your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.desc: We collect your Name, Student ID, Department, and academic details purely to automate PDF generation. This data is never sold or shared.

storage.title: Secure Storage
storage.desc: Your profile is stored securely using Firebase Firestore with strict access controls and encryption at rest.

cloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.desc: CampusFlow uses Google Cloud and Vercel infrastructure. We do not track your personal browsing history or off-site activities.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.desc: You can access, update, or delete your data anytime via your Profile page. For permanent deletion, contact bornosoftnr@gmail.com.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.heading: Essential Cookies Only
cookie.intro: We use minimal cookies to ensure CampusFlow works smoothly. Here is exactly what we use and why.

auth.title: Authentication Cookies
auth.desc: Used to keep you signed in. Essential for the site to function and cannot be switched off.

security.title: Security Cookies
security.desc: Helps prevent fraudulent activity and protect your data from unauthorized access.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.desc: We use Google Firebase for authentication. Google may set cookies for session security. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.

cookie.consent: By using CampusFlow, you consent to our use of these essential cookies. You can manage preferences through your browser settings.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.heading: 100% Free Service
refund.intro: CampusFlow (BornoSoft) is provided free for the student community. Because there are no charges, no refunds are applicable.

pdf.title: PDF Generation
pdf.desc: Unlimited PDF generation is free. If you encounter technical issues, please contact our support team.

premium.title: Premium Features
premium.desc: Should we introduce paid features in the future, a clear refund policy will be established at that time.

refund.footer: Helping students excel without the financial burden.

security.title: Security Policy
security.heading: Built for Trust
security.intro: Your academic data is sensitive. CampusFlow (BornoSoft) is engineered with industry-standard security protocols.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.desc: All data transferred between your browser and our servers is encrypted using TLS/SSL protocols.

cloud.title: Cloud Security
cloud.desc: Your profile is hosted on Google Cloud infrastructure with world-class physical and network security.

access.title: Access Control
access.desc: We implement strict Firebase Security Rules. Only you can read or write your own profile data.

monitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Our team continuously monitors for vulnerabilities and applies security patches to keep your data safe 24/7.
